languages.text: "Нет! Стойте!" {n}Сопротивление Ювенны сломлено. Охваченная ужасом, аристократка обессиленно поникает в ваших руках.{/n} "Я хочу жить. Я расскажу все".
"No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."
languages.original_text: "Нет! Стойте!" {n}Сопротивление Ювенны сломлено. Охваченная ужасом, аристократка обессиленно поникает в ваших руках.{/n} "Я хочу жить. Я расскажу все".

traits.locale_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."
"No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."
"No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

languages.text: «¡No! ¡Alto!». {n}La resistencia de Juvenna se quiebra. El terror la deja inmóvil en tus brazos.{/n} «Quiero vivir. Se lo contaré todo».
languages.original_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

traits.locale_text: «¡No! ¡Alto!». {n}La resistencia de Juvenna se quiebra. El terror la deja inmóvil en tus brazos.{/n} «Quiero vivir. Se lo contaré todo».

languages.text: “不！住手！”{n}尤文娜的抵抗彻底瓦解。她被恐惧压垮，整个人瘫软在你怀里。{/n}“我想活下去。我什么都告诉你。”
languages.original_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

traits.locale_text: “不！住手！”{n}尤文娜的抵抗彻底瓦解。她被恐惧压垮，整个人瘫软在你怀里。{/n}“我想活下去。我什么都告诉你。”

languages.text: « Non ! Arrêtez ! » {n}En Juvenna, toute velléité de résistance est brisée. Le corps de la jeune femme tétanisée par la terreur pend mollement entre vos bras.{/n} « Je veux vivre. Je suis prête à tout vous dire. »
languages.original_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

traits.locale_text: « Non ! Arrêtez ! » {n}En Juvenna, toute velléité de résistance est brisée. Le corps de la jeune femme tétanisée par la terreur pend mollement entre vos bras.{/n} « Je veux vivre. Je suis prête à tout vous dire. »

languages.text: "Hayır! Durun!" {n}Juvenna'nın direnci kırılıyor. Dehşete kapılmış bir hâlde kollarında gevşiyor.{/n} "Yaşamak istiyorum. Her şeyi anlatacağım."
languages.original_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır! Durun!" {n}Juvenna'nın direnci kırılıyor. Dehşete kapılmış bir hâlde kollarında gevşiyor.{/n} "Yaşamak istiyorum. Her şeyi anlatacağım."

languages.text: "Nein! Nicht!" {n}Juvennas Widerstand ist gebrochen. Von Entsetzen überwältigt, hängt sie schlaff in deinen Armen.{/n} "Ich will leben. Ich werde Euch alles erzählen."
languages.original_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

traits.locale_text: "Nein! Nicht!" {n}Juvennas Widerstand ist gebrochen. Von Entsetzen überwältigt, hängt sie schlaff in deinen Armen.{/n} "Ich will leben. Ich werde Euch alles erzählen."

languages.text: 「ダメ！止めて！」{n}ジュベナは恐怖に打ちのめされ、あなたの腕の中で無力に垂れ下がった。{/n}「生きていたい。全てを話します。」
languages.original_text: "No! Stop!" {n}Juvenna's resistance is broken. Overcome by terror, she hangs limply in your arms.{/n} "I want to live. I will tell you everything."

traits.locale_text: 「ダメ！止めて！」{n}ジュベナは恐怖に打ちのめされ、あなたの腕の中で無力に垂れ下がった。{/n}「生きていたい。全てを話します。」
